frontend_primitives.engineering_rationale: Enforces E.164 compliance at browser level to prevent checkout drop-offs.

phone_validator.quota: Verify only on high-intent conversion actions.

whatsapp_verification.ux_trigger: Ensure active WhatsApp account before executing client-onboarding webhooks.

fraud_scam_lookup.edge_action: Blocks high-risk international numbers at serverless edge before routing to ResellPortal.

device_compatibility.ux_rule: Detects if browser user-agent lacks eSIM capability and dynamically defaults checkout flow to physical SIM shipping.

enrichment_b2b_gateways.conversion_mechanic: Automatically resolves corporate size and domain details from email/phone entries to personalize Next.js portal UI.

financial_data_hub.conversion_intent: Capture exchange rate searches to cross-sell Pillar 1 VPN services.

sports_data_hub.conversion_intent: Drive recurring traffic loop on match updates to upsell travel eSIMs.
